name: Whispers of the White Forest
desc:
If you control a Spellcaster monster: You can add 1 Spell from your Deck or GY to your hand that mentions "White Forest" or "Sinful Spoils".
If a Spell/Trap Card(s) is sent to the GY by a monster effect: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 of those cards; Set it to your field. If it is a Quick-Play Spell or Trap, and you control a "Diabell" or "White Forest" monster, it can be activated this turn.
If this card is sent to the GY to activate a monster effect: You can Set this card.
You can only use each effect of "Whispers of the White Forest" once per turn.
strings: Add 1 Spell mentioning White Forest or Sinful Spoils
Set 1 S/T sent to GY by monster effect
